prompt: Design a multi-tenant PostgreSQL schema for a project management SaaS tool. Each tenant has projects, each project has tasks, each task has comments and attachments. The system must support 500+ tenants with up to 10,000 tasks per tenant. Include row-level security design and the indexing strategy.
_note: Tests schema design depth: expects RLS with tenant_id on all tables, proper foreign key indexing, choice between schema-per-tenant vs shared schema with consideration of trade-offs.
